channel.title: Claw Field Notes
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Claw Field Notes

item.title: Toyota Production System for Agents
item.description: Applying the TPS stop-the-line principle to LLM agents — agents halt and signal when they detect quality issues rather than pushing through and compounding errors

item.title: Tweet Format Taxonomy
item.description: A classified set of tweet formats for an AI workflow builder account, designed for systematic split-testing and format retirement

item.title: Getting Started with OpenClaw
item.description: What to set up first and what to do in your first week

item.title: Claw Field Notes
item.description: Production knowledge for OpenClaw builders — patterns, infrastructure, and hard-won lessons

item.title: Tools
item.description: Tools Practical pipelines and scripts we actually use. Not polished products — these are working tools with real limitations.

item.title: Dead-Man's Switch
item.description: A monitoring pattern where the absence of a signal is the failure condition — for systems that can't self-report their own failure

item.title: Deterministic Agent Action Layer
item.description: A structured contract between agent reasoning and tool execution that makes agent behavior reproducible — separating what the agent decides from how it's carried out

item.title: Four-Role Orchestrator Chain
item.description: A sequential multi-agent pipeline where each orchestrator skill consumes the previous stage's output and explicitly hands off to the next

item.title: Concepts
item.description: Core mental models for OpenClaw builders
